input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.13.4.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.13.4.5
            TITLE: efficiencyfactor min is calculated using the above formula with:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.13.4.5: EfficiencyFactor min is calculated using the above formula with:
D.13.4.5 EfficiencyFactor min is calculated using the above formula with: 
• CO2 your  (IC) equivalent to 60.06 kg CO2/100km  (based on gasoline 26 ltr/100km) 
• CO2 your  (EV) equivalent to 20.02 kg CO2/100km  
• Tyour   1.45 times Tmin
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 140 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: EfficiencyFactor min is calculated using the above formula with: • CO2 your (IC) equivalent to 60.06 kg CO2/100km (based on gasoline 26 ltr/100km) • CO2 your (EV) equivalent to 20.02 kg CO2/100km • Tyour 1.45 times Tmin
